recent: A clear goal makes effort more focused.	清晰的目标会让努力更聚焦。
Input without review is easy to forget.	只有输入没有复习，很容易遗忘。
A practical method is to divide a large task into several small steps.	一种实用的方法是把大任务拆成几个小步骤。
Time management shapes how far you can go.	时间管理决定你能走多远。
A useful sentence can save time in writing tasks.	一个好用的句子能在写作任务中节省时间。
Compared with passive input, active output leaves a deeper impression.	与被动输入相比，主动输出会留下更深的印象。
approach	方法；接近；着手处理。
